name: workflow closed-loop step pr-to-audit-pack invokes /audit-pack including the Decision Trail section
command: mkdir -p compliance docs/adr && : > compliance/audit.log && printf '# 0001 d1\n' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/closed-loop-test.sh" --step pr-to-audit-pack --audit-log compliance/audit.log --adr-dir docs/adr --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'audit_pack_invoked=true' out.txt && grep -q 'section: Decision Trail' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
